prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约6155→6589→9265→9826→9509名，整体呈明显后移趋势，近3年累计后移约3350名；2025年基准约9509名，较2024年小幅回升约3 17名；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为61人，2024–2025年增至62人；2026年计划64人，较2025年扩招2人（+3.2%），扩招幅度较小，对 竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第84名（2026年），近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属中上水平理工类院校；第五轮学科评估中 电气工程获评A、动力工程及工程热物理获评A-，均为电力行业核心学科；电气类、能源动力类等招生专业与优势学科高度对应，对考生吸引力较强；2026年高考周期内该校未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度排名未进入前106名，短视频曝光量一般，报考关注度处于中等水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电 气工程及其自动化专业2024年社会热度为高热推荐，能源动力类专业为推荐，电子信息/通信为高热推荐，核心专业热度持续升温；黑龙江省2026年高考总考生约16.7万人，较2025年减少约3%，物理类考生相应减少，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+2人）及本省物理类考生减少等因素，在2025年基准9509名基础上预计竞争略有缓和；预测最低位次约9643名 ，区间9143–10143名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6155 → 6589 → 9265 → 9826 → 9509, showing a clear backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3350 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 9509, a slight increase of about 317 positions from 2024; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang was 61 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 62 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 64 students, an increase of 2 students (+3.2%) from 2025, a relatively small expansion with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics was rated A-, both core disciplines in the electric power industry; majors such as Electrical Engineering and Energy and Power Engineering correspond highly to advantageous disciplines, attracting strong interest from candidates; no significant negative public opinion incidents occurred during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle; the university's Douyin popularity ranking did not enter the top 106, with general short video exposure and moderate application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Electrical Engineering and Its Automation was a high-heat recommendation, Energy and Power Engineering majors were recommended, and Electronic Information/Communication was a high-heat recommendation, with core majors' popularity continuing to rise; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang college entrance examination is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% from 2025, with a corresponding decrease in Physics Category candidates, slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+2 students), and the decrease in local Physics Category candidates, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 9509; the predicted minimum ranking is about 9643, with a range of 9143–10143.

Candidates with rankings significantly above the lower limit of the range (within 9143) can focus on sprinting for A-level discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering.
